Bug / Task Description: Index.Add in internal/tagindex/tagindex.go keeps a per-tag sorted slice of record ids and binary-searches the insertion point both to keep order and to detect an already-present id. The presence check is no longer reliable: re-adding an id under a tag it already carries inserts a second copy instead of being a no-op, so posting lists accumulate duplicates and downstream cardinality/lookup/intersection results over-count. The search must land on an equal element for the dedup guard to see it.
Commit Subject: fix(tagindex): keep posting lists duplicate-free on Add
